title: Environment Setup & Validation

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: User running the environment check script from CLI

use_cases.name: Validate Python Version
use_cases.description: Check that Python >= 3.10 is installed; exit with error if not

use_cases.name: Check Conda Environment
use_cases.description: Verify CONDA_PREFIX env var is set; warn if absent

use_cases.name: Validate Core Packages
use_cases.description: Import-check critical packages: torch, torchvision, diffusers, transformers, megatron.core, transformer_engine

use_cases.name: Validate Training Packages
use_cases.trigger: Only when --training CLI flag is passed

use_cases.name: Report Environment Status
use_cases.description: Print final success banner if all_success is True
use_cases.outcome_success: Print [SUCCESS] Cosmos environment setup is successful!
use_cases.outcome_failure: No final banner printed (individual errors already shown)

use_cases.name: Configure Validation Mode
use_cases.description: Pass --training flag to enable extended training-dependency checks

relationships: Developer --extends--> UC4: Validate Training Packages (when --training flag set)
UC6 --extends--> UC4: Configure Validation Mode enables training checks
preconditions: Script run from project root or with packages on PYTHONPATH
important_notes: Script exits (sys.exit(1)) immediately on Python version failure; conda check is warning-only. Training packages gate-kept behind --training CLI arg. Global flag 'all_success' tracks aggregate result across all check_packages() calls.
